Cookbook Workflows

0. Start Here
1. Introduction to DPmixGPD
2. Available Distributions and Related Functions
3. Basic Workflow: Model Specification, Bundle, & MCMC
4. Backends, Kernels, and Workflow Map
5. Unconditional DPmix (CRP Backend)
6. Unconditional DPmix with CRP Backend
7. Unconditional DPmix with Stick-Breaking Backend
8. Unconditional DPmixGPD with CRP Backend
9. Unconditional DPmixGPD with Stick-Breaking Backend
10. Conditional DPmix with CRP Backend
11. Conditional DPmix with Stick-Breaking Backend
12. Conditional DPmixGPD with CRP Backend
13. Conditional DPmixGPD with Stick-Breaking Backend
14. Causal Inference: No X (CRP) - Gamma Kernel
15. Causal Inference: X Without PS (CRP+SB) - InvGauss/Amoroso
16. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends (CRP+SB) - Cauchy/Laplace
17. Causal Inference: Same Backend (SB) - Laplace Kernel
18. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends (Bulk-only) - Cauchy Kernel
19. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends with GPD - Amoroso Kernel
